text:
sysutils/rubygem-chef PORTVERSION= 10.12.0 requires devel/rubygem-highline>=1.6.9, I've updated devel/rubygem-highline to support this.

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: sysutils/rubygem-chef PORTVERSION= 10.12.0 requires devel/rubygem-highline>=1.6.9
